sourceRef.citation: Justin Kian Ming Wyss et al. 2028

statement.en: Towards smarter prevention : advances in soft sensors and physiological understanding of pressure injuries
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission contains only metadata with an embargoed abstract—no substantive content is available for truth-value evaluation. The axiom itself (advances in soft sensors for pressure injury prevention) is evaluable in principle, but the document provides no evidence, claims, or propositions to assess.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 圧力と血流のバランスが時間を通じて傷害の本質を決定する、という直感。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 組織の層的な圧縮と微細な流れの監視が、目に見えない危害を早期に察知する。
